englishDefinitions: Looks much older because of makeup used to create an older appearance.
Is made to appear older through cosmetic effects.
persianTranslation: با آرایش سن را بالا بردن
examples: The makeup team ages the actor with makeup for the flashback scenes.
They aged her with makeup so she could play a woman in her seventies.
Good lighting can make someone look even older when they are aged with makeup.
